content.en:
And when this mysterious force invaded the Moon Realm, Ye Tian informed the Source God Pavilion, but it took time for several Extreme Realms of the Source God Pavilion and other forces' Extreme Realms to rush to the Moon Gathering Realm.

The mysterious forces had already used some formations to interfere with the void in this territory near the Lanyue Realm, and the Lanyue Realm was blocked.

Even the Extreme Realm half-step Eternal Realm powerhouses could not use the source device to shuttle through space, and directly descended near the Moon Range, they could only descend to the territory not far from the Moon Range, and then fly over at the fastest speed.

And by this time, it was already too late.

Whoa!!!

The True River Sword Ancestor and the Extreme Realm Half-Step Eternal Realm powerhouses of other forces descended here, and found that the Lanyue Realm had been shattered, countless living beings had disappeared, and the Lanyue Pavilion had also disappeared completely, and the Lanyue Origin Ancestor had also fallen.

"One step slower!"

The True River Sword Ancestor muttered.

In an instant, a half-step Eternal Realm left here.

And not long after, Ye Tian's copy body descended on the Source God Pavilion again.

Inside the Genjin Pavilion.

Ye Tian and the Twelve Ancestors met, and everyone sat down and started chatting.

The True River Sword Ancestor asked directly: "Endless Ancestor, you said before that you promised to be able to find out the identity of the other party, have you found out now?"

"Find out!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Under the investigation of the copying talent, the Extreme Realm had no way to hide his identity at all.

"Which force is it?"

True River Sword Ancestor hurriedly asked.

Ye Tian said: "Which force, I don't know very well, but I know who the extreme realm is?"

"Who is it?"

The other twelve ancestors were also curious.

"Star Demon Ancestor!"

Ye Tian revealed.

"It's him, are you sure?"

The True River Sword Ancestor frowned.

"Yes, I can guarantee 100% that as for believe it or not, that's none of my business. Ye Tian said.

"Do you know who the Star Demon Origin Ancestor is?"

Zhenhe Sword Ancestor asked.

"I don't know. Ye Tian only knew the identity of the other party from the exploration of the copying talent, but he really didn't know who this Extreme Realm half-step Eternal Realm powerhouse was.

The True River Sword Ancestor began to tell the origin of the Star Demon Origin Ancestor.

"Star Demon Origin Ancestor is one of the oldest half-step Eternal Realms in the Source Sea, even older than many Eternal Realms, and has not appeared for a long time, and he is also the master of Star Demon Mountain, and he has dozens of half-step Eternal Realms under his command. What's more, one of the disciples of the Star Demon Origin Ancestor was promoted to the Eternal Realm. "

Star Demon Origin Ancestor has a disciple of the Eternal Realm?

Ye Tian finally knew why the True River Sword Ancestor and the others were frowning, because the other party's origin was too big.

No matter how powerful the Eternal Realm was, the Twelve Ancestors didn't dare to offend each other.

Therefore, if you want to deal with the Star Demon Origin Ancestor, you have to consider the Eternal Realm behind the other party.

Moreover, although the Star Demon Origin Ancestor has destroyed many forces, there is no Eternal Realm behind these forces, and those forces with the backing of the Eternal Realm will really offend an Eternal Realm for the sake of those forces that have been destroyed?

Moreover, the Star Demon Origin Ancestor himself was not weak.

"The strength of the Star Demon Source Ancestor is the Three Extremes Realm, we are not opponents!"

The True River Sword Ancestor shook his head.

Obviously, he didn't dare to go to the trouble of the Star Demon Origin Ancestor.

"Twelve Ancestors, how do you deal with this matter?"

Ye Tian asked.

Zhenhe Sword Ancestor and the others were silent for a while, and only then did they make a decision.

"We will spread the news about the Star Demon Ancestor, but we will not make a move, after all, we can't kill the Star Demon Ancestor, and we can't afford to offend the Star Demon Ancestor. "

True River Sword Ancestor said helplessly.

"I see!"

Ye Tian didn't say anything, and he wouldn't persuade the True River Sword Ancestor to do it.

After all, let them kill the extreme realm that they can't kill, and there is an eternal realm behind this extreme realm, and no half-step eternal realm has such guts.

Subsequently, Ye Tian left.

He knew that he couldn't count on the Source God Pavilion for this matter.

However, the Source God Pavilion still spread the news in a covert way.

Gradually, the entire Source Sea knew about the Star Demon Origin Ancestor.

After all, in the entire Yuanhai era, the number of extreme realms did not exceed three digits, and it was only eighty or ninety.

If you remove the ones that are not suspected, the number will be even smaller.

Therefore, after the Star Demon Origin Ancestor was revealed, many forces believed it.

-------------

Star Demon Mountain.

The Star Demon Origin Ancestor also knew the news from the outside world, and was immediately puzzled.

"It's strange, my movements are fast, it's impossible to expose at all, who the hell leaked it?"

Star Demon Origin Ancestor was surprised.

Although the news was exposed, it was nothing to him, and no half-step Eternal Realm dared to deal with him, after all, one of his disciples was an Eternal Realm.

However, if the news leaks, he will inevitably be targeted, and once he wants to do it again, it will be a little troublesome.

"The power absorbed by the Blood Devouring Bead is not enough, not enough for me to be promoted to the Eternal Realm, and I have to destroy some more forces!"

Star Demon Origin Ancestor said secretly.

Instantly, one force after another appeared in his mind, and he finally locked on a target.

Ancient Shrine!

This is also not a weak force, it can be regarded as an alliance force, with six half-step Eternal Realms, and the strongest of them is only the top half-step Eternal Realm, not the Extreme Realm.

Although it would take a little time to kill a top-notch half-step Eternal Realm with his strength, but he had already been exposed, so there was no need to worry about speed, even if the Ancient Divine Palace was discovered, no one would dare to attack him.

The Ancient Divine Palace is not weak, destroy the Ancient Divine Palace, and then destroy one or two forces, and you will almost have the strength together.

this day.

The Star Demon Origin Ancestor took eighteen half-step Eternal Realms and set off from Star Demon Mountain to the Ancient Divine Palace.

Soon.

The Ancient Divine Palace was surrounded by the Star Demon Source Ancestor, and the space-time Hengsha Bead blocked the void, and even the half-step Eternal Realm couldn't escape from here.

The Black Demon Saint Ancestor of the Ancient Divine Palace was immediately terrified when he saw the Star Demon Source Ancestor and so many half-step Eternal Realms.

"Star Demon Origin Ancestor, if you let us go, I am willing to hand over all the treasure resources!"

The Black Demon Saint Ancestor panicked.

The other powerhouses of the Ancient Divine Palace also panicked, today this is a desperate situation!

"Do it!"

A venerable half-step Eternal Realm of Star Demon Mountain made a move, killing countless powerhouses, and these powerhouses of the Ancient Divine Palace were all swallowed up by the river of blood turned into blood-devouring beads, and there were not even corpses left.

And the Black Demon Saint Ancestor was targeted by the Star Demon Source Ancestor, and the two sides fought, or the Black Demon Saint Ancestor was completely beaten, and he couldn't even fight.

The only thing the Black Sage Ancestor could do was to delay as much time as possible, maybe there would be an Extreme Realm powerhouse to rescue him?

Meanwhile.

The Source God Pavilion and other top forces also got the news that the Star Demon Source Ancestor had invaded the Ancient Divine Palace, and the news was extremely certain.

This also completely confirmed the fact that the Star Demon Origin Ancestor was the mastermind behind the scenes, but many extreme realms did not dare to do it.

Not long after, the Star Demon Source Ancestor killed the Black Demon Saint Ancestor, destroyed the Ancient Divine Palace, and was about to leave.

Suddenly.

This source sea area changed, and they came to a world of ice in an instant.

This ice world even froze the origin of the Source Sea, as if it could freeze everything.

It was an earth-shattering array, and the enemy managed to set it up in a short time.

"Wuji Ice Ancestor, it's you, are you going to make a move on me?"

Star Demon Origin Ancestor said in horror.

Wuji Ice Ancestor, one of the six extreme realm powerhouses of the Yuan Sea era, is a half-step eternal realm at the level of the Seven Extremes Realm, far surpassing his strength.

Such a strong man actually attacked him, and secretly arranged a large array, this is not to let him escape!

Click!!!

The half-step Eternal Realm of Star Demon Mountain was frozen, although he was not dead yet, but once he was frozen for a long time and his body was frozen and shattered, he was really dead.
